---
title: "Current Psychology Technicians Tasks"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

This is a list of current tasks I have created to help both students and
staff clearly understand the responsibilities of the psychology
technicians.

::: callout-important
# Current Task

Focus on establishing the **H&S Training List** and **Traffic Light
Dashboard** to ensure lab safety and resource transparency.
:::

# Tasks

::: callout-note
## Project Overview

This roadmap tracks the development of the Psychology Technician Website
and Ecosystem of resources, guides, and procedures. Items marked with
`[x]` are completed.
:::

## Ongoing Tasks 

-   **Update Immersive Applications section** (Find more)

    -   Horizon Workrooms are being removed. Maybe create an Experiment
        version of it?
    -   ShapesXR - A good way to teach student's how to create on
        MetaQuest? How do I implement it with Unity Experimental
        Framework?
    -   MetaSteps - Another no-code creation for VR.
    -   Create a Immersive version of the lab?
    -   **Establish Immersive Resources**: Collaborate with the
        Immersive Team with resources and online stuff.
    -   XSens **Update AI Section**

-   **Update AI Tools sections**

    -   NotebookLM: https://notebooklm.google/ - a research and
        note-taking application from Google.

-   **Update** / **Improve data science section**

    -   Use some references from here and PhD work –\>
        <https://teachpsych.org/E-xcellence-in-Teaching-Blog>

-   **Update Risk Assessments section**

    -   Add necessary links for new SOPS + Equipment

        -   Add when EEG is acquiesced –\>
            [ttps://eeg100.org/](https://eeg100.org/)

    -   **SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)**: Short, bulleted guides
        (e.g., sanitizing VR headsets, applying EEG gel).

## **Website Tasks**

-   Fix Traffic Light System Dark Mode Functionality in Equipment Page
-   Create a GitHub Repository with all the data-sets that Technicians
    will use for Teaching for R, Python and SPSS examples.
    -   Where to find open data sets
        -   Kaggle
        -   Data.gov.uk
        -   awesomedata/awesome-public-datasets
        -   World Bank Open Data
    -   From Data-Cleaning
    -   From Statistical Modelling
-   Create a Feedback section in the Booking System in Microsoft Forms
-   Add Risk Assessment's table into Student Section.
-   Add a Frequently Asked Questions section in the Student section.
-   Create and Add a Maintenance banner that activates on specific dates
    instead of using the callout function.
-   **Visitor Metrics**: Add site visit interactivity to view website
    traffic statistics.
-   **Update - Add ethics Application "Common Pitfalls"** A specific
    list of reasons the Ethics Committee sends applications back. Also
    add a "Correct vs. Incorrect" examples.
-   **KTANE**: Add details into equipment catalog.
-   **Comprehensive Equipment List**: Expand website catalog (e.g.,
    Neural Network resources).
-   **Complete these sections**: Available Studies, Researcher
    Requirements, Coding Repository
-   **Online Textbook**: Establish web-based resource for Research
    Method modules.
    -   Focused around Data Science & Research Methods in Psychology
-   **Tobii EyeTracker**: Establish Risk Assessments, H&S Procedures,
    and open PsychoPy Case Studies.
-   **Technician Chat Bot**: Implement a GPT-based bot to assist with
    queries beyond basic FAQs.
-   **Virtual Tour**: Implement a photo-slider or 360° image of the
    Psychology labs.
-   **OSF & Version Control**: Develop a guide for integrating projects
    with OSF and GitHub.
-   **Search Optimizations**: Add keywords to metadata on every page for
    internal site search. - Add this to the ethics guides - Add this to
    the H&S Guides - Add this to the Risk Assessments Guides
-   **FAQ Section**: Add a specific FAQ bot and section to the technical
    page.
-   **Preregistration**: Add a guide on why it matters and how to
    execute it on OSF.
-   **Data Management Plans**: Guidance on secure storage of sensitive
    data on university servers in the Ethics section.
-   **Coding Snippets**: A "Cookbook" of R/Python code for cleaning
    eye-tracker data, counterbalancing, etc.
-   **Interactive Demo Experiments**: Embed mini-experiments using
    JavaScript or Gorilla iframes.
-   **Add friendly AI**: Create a GPT for answering module specific
    questions.
-   **Statistics Flowchart**: An interactive/visual guide for choosing
    the correct statistical test. Take from Statistical Theory & A
    Student's guide to Bayesian Statistics. Create a tree node.
-   **Poster Printing Guide**: Dimensions, templates, and instructions
    for final year posters.
-   Add a Docker for helping students to run R code in small cloud
    environments. (Long-term task)

[**Automation**]{.underline}

-   Figure out how to use free AI models from Claude AI for Claude Code
    and Claude MCP with N8N MCP.
-   Add Clawdbot into Automation Stream of ideas?
-   Add integrators to PowerAutomate + Microsoft Bookings for possible
    automation.
-   **Administrative Automation**: Identify and implement ways to
    automate departmental administrative tasks.
    -   Use n8n? Possible new alternatives other than PowerAutomate?
-   Add **Risk Assessments**: Add downloadable Risk Assessments for both
    Students and Staff.
-   Complete an Asset Management Register / Inventory Checklist / Future
    equipment proposals.
-   **Equipment Deadlines**: Create separate equipment deadlines for
    Undergraduates and Postgraduates.

**Online Programme**

-   Create a Psychology Technician Page specifically for the Online
    Programme

**Resources**

-   Add software resources

    -   <https://www.reaper.fm/>

**Platforms**

-   **GitHub Expansion**: Add more code and scripts to the GitHub
    Repository.
    -   Complete FUKUDA Step Test (Neuro-otological test) GitHub
        experiment using Camera Object tracking to detect unilateral;
        vestibular hypofunction.
    -   Detecting Anxiety and Depression with Facial and speech emotion
        recognition
        ([github](https://github.com/hariharitha21/Detection-of-Anxiety-and-Depression))
    -   Utilising VR for social anxiety
        ([github](https://github.com/Agora-VR/Agora-VR))
    -   Detecting subclinical social anxiety using physiological data
        from a wrist worn wearable
        ([github](https://github.com/rs2416/Detecting_Social_Anxiety))
    -   Detecting real-time face and emotional recongition
        (<https://github.com/PratikSavla/aio-bot>)
    -   Extract more:
        <https://github.com/jasiek-net/awesome-psychology-projects>
-   Develop R, Python, and Julia scripts to replace SPSS in the
    department.

**New Procedures**

-   **Hormone Data Acquisition**: Establish neuroendocrinological
    procedures for the department.
-   **SONA System**: Establish SONA for recruitment within the
    department.
-   **Immersive:** Establish Training Procedures for available equipment
    within the HEIQ.

**Immersive Tools**

-   **VR Lounge**: Create a Virtual Reality Space featuring several
    psychology experiments. The space will be a VR environment for
    psychology student's to be able to understand a full scope of
    applications that they can use for their own experiments.

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module:
        [Astygmatism](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PDHMxMQ9jag)

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module: [Macular
        Degeneration](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zNYiGVfmKgI)

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module: [Eye
        Shadows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WoGK_Xf9cdU)

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module: [Visual Deficit
        Suite](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9kRilVoQxgI)

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module: [VR Simulation of
        Starbursting, halosm and ghosting after laser eye
        surgery](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CqNWlAJ0vH8)

    -   Create (Cognitive) Experimental Module: [Visual Deficits in
        Virtual Reality](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=B1Bi3i-zFH4)

    -   Create (Biological) Experimental Module: 3D VR Interactive Brain
        Lab

    -   Create (Social) Experimental Module: Prisoner's Dilemma with
        *Trustful* AI.

    -   Create (Developmental) Experimental Module: Biological
        Neuro-Development Showcase

    -   **Laboratory Induction**: Create a VR Laboratory Induction
        Module for users.

-   Enhance Experimental Tasks into Experimental Repository Sections

    -   Add Unity Experimental Framework Guide
        -   Add Trellis 2 https://github.com/microsoft/TRELLIS.2

-   **Add GitHub Repositories** of interest and add them into a
    compendium list onto the Technician Website. Then categorise them
    for Subject of interest.

    -   Biological Psychology: https://github.com/rasmusab/drinkr
        (Influence of Alcohol) +
        https://github.com/rasmusab/iba-cocktails
    -   Cognitive Psychology:
        https://github.com/rasmusab/bitsy-maze-generator (Cog Task)
    -   https://github.com/AnshKathpal/Kinder-Counselor-Chatbot
    -   <https://github.com/pieeg-club/EEGwithRaspberryPI>
    -   <https://mynoise.net/NoiseMachines/binauralBrainwaveGenerator.php>

**Equipment**

-   **Staff "WANT" List**: Add a section for staff to suggest equipment.

    -   Create the 3D EyeTrackers.

        -   <https://github.com/JEOresearch/EyeTracker/tree/main>

    -   Add FNRIS into the equipment list.

    -   Add EEG into the equipment list

    -   Add Meta VR Headsets (Target internal grants upon release).

    -   Create low-cost FNRIS

        -   del Angel Arrieta, F., Cisneros, M. R., Rivas, J. J.,
            Castrejón, L. R., Sucar, L. E., Andreu-Perez, J., &
            Orihuela-Espina, F. (2021, November). Characterization of a
            Raspberry Pi as the core for a low-cost multimodal EEG-fNIRS
            platform. In *2021 43rd Annual International Conference of
            the IEEE Engineering in Medicine & Biology Society
            (EMBC)* (pp. 1288-1291). IEEE.

**Biological Psychology**

-   Add some components from Neuroscience to improve **bio-psychology**
    **content.**

**Miscellaneous**

-   Try to find out ways to use Rasperry Pi for Psychology, Automation,
    or for teaching.

    -   Jolles, J. W. (2021). Broad‐scale applications of the Raspberry
        Pi: A review and guide for biologists. *Methods in Ecology and
        Evolution*, *12*(9), 1562-1579.

    -   Mathe, S. E., Kondaveeti, H. K., Vappangi, S., Vanambathina, S.
        D., & Kumaravelu, N. K. (2024). A comprehensive review on
        applications of Raspberry Pi. *Computer Science Review*, *52*,

        100636. 

    -   <https://www.raspberrypi.org/blog/grounded-cognition/>

    -   <https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/807693v1.full.pdf>

    -   <https://forums.raspberrypi.com/viewtopic.php?t=83037>

    -   <https://brendg.co.uk/2021/07/26/creating-a-mood-detector-using-lobe-and-a-raspberry-pi/>

    -   <https://www.bps.org.uk/psychologist/why-do-we-need-psychology-and-what-does-psychology-need>

    -   <https://www.britishecologicalsociety.org/raspberry-pi-computers-are-helping-revolutionize-biological-research/>

## 

\[INSERT REMAINING TASKS FROM LOCAL REPOSITORIES IN HERE\]

# Completed Tasks

-   [x] **Create an AI section** All the relevant AI tools for students,
    staff, researchers etc. (02/2026)
-   [x] **Add an Immersive Tools section** (02/2026)
-   [x] **Add Risk Assessment - H&S - SOPs Section** (02/2026)
-   [x] **Traffic Light Dashboard**: Show real-time
    availability/maintenance status for labs and equipment. (02/2026)
-   [x] Create a URL to the Technician Space. Then place it on the
    noticeboard in front of K115. (02/2026)
-   [x] **Technician News**. (02/2026)
-   [x] **Scheduling**: Add Microsoft Booking onto the Wrexham
    Technician Page (02/2026)
-   [x] Add new gorilla.sc link into the Open Materials Section.
    (02/2026)
-   [x] **Open Materials**: Add Gorilla.sc experiments into the open
    materials section.
-   [x] Add the new booking system onto the WU-Psychology-Technician
    Website (02/2026)
-   [x] Add appropriate University branding to the Psych-Tech Website
    (01-2026)
-   [x] Add appropriate functionality to the website (01-2026)
-   [x] Add 200$\approx$ Psychometric Scales to Gorilla.sc Wrexham Open
    Materials
-   [ ] Add Wrexham University logo and make it interactive (01-2026)
    -   [x] Also add useful links as planetary orbit around logo.

# Removed Ideas

-   **Technician Support**: Here we can book another system maybe for
    things that the psych staff want?

    -   `span style="color:red;"> No point as it is a small department. Maybe instead do it for externals or when dept expands </span>`)

-   Add **Health & Safety Training**. Specifically, add H&S Training
    list for Students, Staff, and Technicians.

    -   `span style="color:red;"> No point. Keep it in house. </span>`)

-   **Create a Staff Section**:

    -   **Grant Support Section**: Technical specifications for
        equipment to be used in grant applications.
        -   `span style="color:red;"> No point. The website needs to be more for the student's than the staff. Therefore keep it in house. </span>`)
